title: Ici Bedwars
description: This pack retextures the items, blocks, and even adds star particles to enhance the bedwars experience for players on modern versions!
body: Ici Bedwars creates a good texture pack for bedwars on 1.21! This pack combines two popular 1.8.9 packs, Treasure 16x and Dewier's 20k Pack, as well as Bare Bones and Simple Water to create an awesome bedwars experience on modern verisions! For questions, suggestions, and more, go to this page: https://github.com/jamescoding123/Ici-Bedwars
